title: feat: update social generation models
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Uses `gpt-5.6-terra` for news and social text generation.
- Uses `nanobanana-2-lite` for realtime, daily, and weekly social images.
- Keeps the social pipeline and brand prompt documentation aligned with the shared model configuration.
- Validated both model IDs against the live API, compiled all social Python scripts, and checked for stale model references.

gist.headline: The garden got new brushes
gist.blurb: The social bot now writes with gpt-5.6-terra and paints with nanobanana-2-lite. Same hive notes, fresher tiny pixels.
gist.summary: Updated the internal social pipeline to generate news and post copy with gpt-5.6-terra and realtime, daily, and weekly images with nanobanana-2-lite.
gist.impact: Pollinations announcements can now use the shared current text and image model configuration while the public API experience remains unchanged.
gist.visual_concept: An internal content-workbench refresh: Polly, wearing a tiny editor visor, tends two glowing code-plants labeled as text and image generation beside a retro terminal. The lime-green garden represents the shared configuration; no additional mascot is needed because this is a behind-the-scenes social-pipeline change.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny editor visor, tending two code-plants beside a retro CRT terminal: one plant grows neat text pages and the other grows tiny landscape pictures. Prominent soft lime green (#ecf874) glow, warm cream and lavender garden shed, pixel flowers and vines, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; small pixel-font terminal labels read “TEXT” and “IMAGE”, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny editor visor, tending two code-plants beside a retro CRT terminal: one plant grows neat text pages and the other grows tiny landscape pictures. Prominent soft lime green (#ecf874) glow, warm cream and lavender garden shed, pixel flowers and vines, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; small pixel-font terminal labels read “TEXT” and “IMAGE”, nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
